description: Product description Mastermind Mens Fragrance Size: 100ml Type: Eau De Toilette BEAUTIFUL PRESENTED BOX AND BOTTLE VAPORISATEUR NATURAL SPRAY MADE IN THE U.K. Ingredients Perfume Directions Spray the perfume on the pulse points, such as the inner sides of the wrists, the inner sides of the elbows and the neck. Avoid spraying the perfume directly on the skin as this can cause an excessive fragrance. Allow the perfume to dry before putting on clothes to avoid stains. See more
